allow: Bash(docker compose exec db pg_isready -U postgres -d cz_migration_dev)

Bash(docker compose exec db psql -U postgres -d cz_migration_dev -c "SELECT tablename, indexname FROM pg_indexes WHERE schemaname = ''public'' AND indexname NOT LIKE ''pk_%'' ORDER BY tablename, indexname;")

Bash(docker compose exec db psql -U postgres -d cz_migration_dev -c "SELECT count\(*\) as ctrl_count FROM mcz04_ctrl; SELECT count\(*\) as kousuu_count FROM tcz01_hosyu_kousuu; SELECT count\(*\) as orgn_count FROM mcz12_orgn_kr; SELECT count\(*\) as kategori_count FROM mcz02_hosyu_kategori;")
Bash(docker compose exec -T backend sh -c "cat build/reports/tests/test/index.html 2>/dev/null | head -100")
Bash(docker compose exec -T workspace sh -c "cd /workspace/01_project/backend && gradle test --no-daemon --tests ''com.example.czConsv.service.WorkStatusServiceTest'' 2>&1")
Bash(docker compose exec -T workspace sh -c "cd /workspace/01_project/backend && gradle test --tests ''com.example.czConsv.service.WorkHoursServiceTest'' --no-daemon 2>&1")

Bash(docker compose exec -T workspace sh -c "cd /workspace/01_project/backend && gradle test --tests ''com.example.czConsv.service.MonthlyControlServiceTest'' --tests ''com.example.czConsv.service.ValidationServiceTest'' --tests ''com.example.czConsv.service.FiscalYearResolverTest'' -x compileTestJava --no-daemon 2>&1")
